title: 7 Herbal Creams For Rheumatoid Arthritis
description: Zingiber officinale creams contains active constituents like gingerols and shogaols. These compounds have anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and pain in joints. They also have antioxidant properties that protect the body from damage caused by free radicals, which can contribute to rheumatoid arthritis. The anti-inflammatory properties of gingerols and shogaols can also help block the production of pain-causing chemicals in the body. By reducing inflammation and pain...
